title: erioneuron avenaceum var. longiglume
intro: Erioneuron avenaceum var. longiglume, also known as long-glumed erioneuron, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The long-glumed erioneuron plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and soothing skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a medicinal drink, and it can also be used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
